ActorFrame.children: <ActorFrame InitCommand="%function() Beep = 0 end" GlitchCommand="%function(self) s = math.random(2,3)*.075 self:sleep(s) s = 'Sound'; s = s .. math.random(1,3) self:queuecommand(s) Beep = Beep + 1; if Beep < 15 then self:queuecommand('Glitch') end end" Sound1Command="%function() Sound('Retro_blink0.ogg') end" Sound2Command="%function() Sound('Retro_blink1.ogg') end" Sound3Command="%function() Sound('Retro_blink2.ogg') end" />
